text.title: trade-off-technical-debt Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for trade-off-technical-debt as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Accepting deliberate reckless debt ("no time for design") without documentation or escalation.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Reckless deliberate debt compounds. Without documentation, the next engineer adds more shortcuts on top, never knowing that refactoring was intended. This transforms a one-time trade-off into permanent architectural entropy.
